title: Add dueDate field to domain Todo model
description: Add a nullable date-only `dueDate` field to the backend domain model and ensure JSON serialization supports ISO-8601 date-only values.

title: Add dueDate to API DTOs and mapping
description: Add `dueDate` to request/response DTOs and mapping logic in the service layer.

title: Validate dueDate on incoming requests
description: Validate that `dueDate` is either absent/null or a valid ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD); return 400 for invalid dates.

title: Unit tests for model ↔ DTO mapping and validation
description: Add unit tests covering mapping between domain model and DTOs and validation behavior for `dueDate`.

title: Update API documentation and examples
description: Update API docs to include `dueDate` in examples and OpenAPI spec.

title: Add integration tests for create/update/get flows with dueDate
description: Integration tests that cover create/update/get with `dueDate` present and absent, asserting serialization and API behavior.

title: Add date input to Create Todo form and wire to API client
description: Frontend: add date picker/input to create/edit forms and ensure empty value is allowed and sent as null/absent.

title: Display dueDate in todo list rows and detail view
description: Frontend: show dueDate in compact format in lists and a readable label in detail views; show 'No deadline' when absent.

title: Add UI tests for create/edit and list/detail display
description: Frontend UI tests verifying create/edit flows with `dueDate` and that list/detail display render correctly.

title: Add nullable due_date DB migration script (if using DB)
description: Add migration script to add nullable `due_date` column; include rollout note. Skip if in-memory storage only.

title: Update todo-management spec and add changelog entry
description: Add `dueDate` to `openspec/specs/todo-management.md` and write a changelog/release note describing the additive change.

title: Test Bead: print hello from backend
